title: Fps Boosted_Optimized
description: This Modpack boosts your FPS count and makes it more playable
body: This Modpack Boosts your FPS count and makes it more Optimized. The Modpack boosts your FPS Count by over 2x going from average 100 to 220 average.Thats a 2.2X boost in the FPS from this ModPack you can download mods with this this is just for boosting your FPS
